# Skill Registry — moonlight-vitaminado
# Generated by: sdd-init
# Date: 2026-03-18

## Project-Level Skills (.agent/skills/)

| Skill | Trigger | Path |
|-------|---------|------|
| `sdd-init` | Initialize SDD, "sdd init", "iniciar sdd" | `.agent/skills/sdd-init/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-explore` | Investigate codebase, think through feature, clarify requirements | `.agent/skills/sdd-explore/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-propose` | Create or update change proposal with intent, scope, approach | `.agent/skills/sdd-propose/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-spec` | Write or update specifications with requirements and scenarios | `.agent/skills/sdd-spec/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-design` | Write or update technical design with architecture decisions | `.agent/skills/sdd-design/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-tasks` | Break down a change into implementation task checklist | `.agent/skills/sdd-tasks/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-apply` | Implement tasks, write actual code following specs and design | `.agent/skills/sdd-apply/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-verify` | Validate that implementation matches specs, design, and tasks | `.agent/skills/sdd-verify/SKILL.md` |
| `sdd-archive` | Archive a completed change after implementation and verification | `.agent/skills/sdd-archive/SKILL.md` |
| `skill-registry` | Create or update the skill registry | `.agent/skills/skill-registry/SKILL.md` |

|------|---------|
| `AGENTS.md` | Workspace config — skill index, rules, project context |
| `.agent/rules/sdd-orchestrator.md` | Orchestrator delegation rules + SDD workflow |
| `.agent/rules/engram-memory-protocol.md` | When/how to use engram memory |

## Stack & Tech

- **Language**: C++17, QML
- **Framework**: Qt6 (qmake6 build system)
- **Video**: FFmpeg ≥6.1, libplacebo ≥v7.349.0 (Vulkan renderer)
- **Audio**: Opus via libopus
- **Submodules**: moonlight-common-c, h264bitstream, qmdnsengine
- **Target platform**: Bazzite Linux / ROG Ally (AMD RDNA GPU, Wayland+Gamescope)
- **Server protocol**: NVHTTP (Sunshine/Vibepollo REST API on :47990)

## Key Files (Relevance to Improvement Plan)

| File | Relevance |
|------|-----------|
| `app/streaming/video/ffmpeg.cpp` | FFmpeg decoding pipeline, codec selection |
| `app/streaming/video/ffmpeg-renderers/renderer.h` | Renderer interface (Vulkan, VAAPI, etc.) |
| `app/backend/nvhttp.cpp` | NVHTTP protocol — serverinfo, launch, capabilities |
| `app/settings/streamingpreferences.cpp` | User preferences — bitrate, codec, HDR, resolution |
| `app/streaming/session.cpp` | Session lifecycle — connect, stream, disconnect |
| `app/streaming/bandwidth.cpp` | Bandwidth estimation |
